title: 150 Pack MINI Makeup Spatulas, Reusable Cream Tip Spatulas Frosted Cosmetic Spatulas Scoops by Accmor
description:
Premium quality : these spatulas are made from polypropylene, smooth surface without sharp edges; The tip spatula is 8 cm/ 3.2 inch long and 1.5 cm/ 0.6 inch wide, BPA free.
150 Pieces: 150 packs facial spatulas in 5 colors are enough for your spare or replacement; A good makeup accessory for ladies and girls.
Keep cosmetic clean: a good beauty skin care tool, the cosmetic tip spatula can take cosmetic out from the jar for less mess and keeping it clean.
Convenient to carry: the plastic spatulas are comfortable to grip and convenient to carry in your makeup bag; Portable and lightweight
Wide usage: the cosmetic spatulas are good for applying make-up, such as facial cream, body cream and so on; also fit for DIY cosmetic products, sampling beauty products, etc.
reviews_5s:
Great for skincare products to make sure you get every drop.It’s great for getting cosmetics/salves out of small jars, I add one for each jar I sell.I like the fact there are 4 different colors of spatulas . They are a little more flexible than I expected . Not a real hard spatula They can be used for multi things Make up & face creams . I use different spatula colors for different face creams & clean them with soap warm water dry them , spray with rubbing alcohol so not to contaminate my face creams by using same ones. Many in same package , so I use one a few times & then throw spatula away . I love themDidn't really need this many, but for the price it was a good deal. Use them for some of my essential oil recipesPlay Video
I really loved these reusable spatulas I think they’re great for stage make up but honestly you can use them for whatever you wish. Since I am a make up artist I personally find that they are useful for stage make up and I use them with my ben nye make up kit and it really makes life easier. My make up kit is for myself and also for others so this keeps things clean and hygienic. If you were to use this on yourself only you then there’s no problem reusing these as long as you can very well. Also you could do the same thing if you’re a make up artist just make sure you set a ties them and clean and wash them very well. Enjoy!I purchased these mini spatulas for my makeup kit to use for sanitization purposes while dispensing products. The shipping was quick and reliable. I love the variety of colors in the spatulas and the bag they were in upon arrival is very sturdy. The spatulas can be used to scoop skincare products out and are easy to grip/use. I will definitely repurchase in the future!These mini makeup and lotion spatulas are exactly what I was looking for. They are sturdy, love the variety of colors and you can't beat the price! I use them to send gifts to customers and use these spatulas to get lotion out of the little containers and they work perfectly. Plus, they're reusable! Great price, especially for 150 of them, sturdy, awesome selection of colors!I hate dipping my finger into moisturizers and other skin/beauty products so I was glad to come across these. Not only does it eliminate mess, but also is more sanitary. They are a bit bigger than I imagined but still a perfect size. If you wash and store the spatula with the product you are using it for, than 150 of them should last a long time!These are small spoons that work great for my cosmetics. They are sturdy and don't have a cheap, flimsy feel to them. They are great giveaways to pair with your products to reduce the risk of contamination.Are use them for face creams make up and there’s so many of them I split them with my daughter and she uses them for scrubs in the shower so many uses specially if you have a nails And hate when stuff gets underneath them this is perfect
reviews_1s: The package came sealed. Before opening, I could visibly see what looked like dirt. Opened the bag and there was a lot of dirt, along with hair. Would not recommend, and threw these straight into the garbage.
